title: Stellaria glauca lusus virens
taxonomy: Stellaria glauca lusus virens is a variant of the species Stellaria glauca, which falls under the family Caryophyllaceae. This family is commonly known as the pink or carnation family and consists of about 80 genera. Stellaria glauca lusus virens is a type of creeping or mat-forming plant that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It is a variation of the more commonly known Stellaria glauca, which is a perennial plant found in wet meadows and along streams. The classification of Stellaria glauca lusus virens reflects its unique characteristics and adaptation to specific environments.
